---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: 'feat: '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? Describe your workflow and where you get stuck, rather than jumping straight to a solution.

## Proposed solution

What would you like Cadence to do? Be as specific as you can.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you've thought about or tried?

## Who else would benefit?

Help us understand how common this use case is — team size, how often you hit this, etc.

## Additional context

Mockups, links to similar features in other tools, or anything else that helps.
